description_long: This is a heavy-duty hammer with a robust, rectangular metal head and a long, cylindrical handle. The head is solid and blocky, with a slightly textured, dark metallic surface that suggests it is made of steel or iron. The handle appears to be made of wood, showing a natural brown color and a straight, unadorned form, attached securely to the head. The hammer's head is double-sided, with both ends flat and squared, indicating it is likely a sledgehammer designed for delivering powerful blows. There are visible signs of wear and oxidation, particularly on the metal head, giving it a rugged, well-used appearance. No visible branding, logos, or additional attachments are present on the hammer.
description: A rugged sledgehammer with a blocky, dark metal head and a long, straight wooden handle, showing signs of wear and oxidation.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the wooden handle and the rectangular, double-sided metal head.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the broad, flat striking face of the hammer's head and the alignment of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again displaying the length of the handle and the solid, blocky head.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the end of the handle and the back face of the hammer's head.
attribute_handle_type: wooden straight handle, smooth, cylindrical, no visible grip enhancements
attribute_head_type: rectangular sledgehammer head, double-sided, both faces flat and squared, made of metal
attribute_wear_or_damage_marks: visible oxidation and surface wear on the metal head, minor discoloration on the handle
